plugin_desc: ATOP industrial Ethernet switch SNMP baseline collection (enterprise 3755). This template uses standard MIB-II / IF-MIB to collect device uptime and 64-bit HC interface traffic. Current public facts confirm ATOP managed switch products, the ATOP enterprise root, and official SNMP-based management tooling, but they do not expose stable shared CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power health leaf OIDs with conservative status semantics, so vendor health metrics are not promoted into device-health metrics.
name: Switch
